reference: I have pain on the left side of my stomach. It comes and goes. I have had an X-ray scan of my esophagus and a scan of my gallbladder. Everything came up negative. I also have pain in my middle back that started about a month ago and is getting worse. Any thoughts?
text: I have pain on the left side of my stomach. It comes in waves. I have had an extra span of my esophagus and a span of my gallbladder. I've been thinking about moving it. I also have pain in my middle back. That started about a month ago. It is getting worse. Any thoughts?
